Hosted gaming parties

Bring everyone together. We’ll handle the rest.

PlayStation, Nintendo, racing and VR experiences brought directly to your venue, with setup and a dedicated host included.

View packagesHow it works
  • Delivered and set up
  • Hosted throughout
  • Games selected for the group

Packages

Choose the experience that fits your party.

Two clear hosted options, both built around shared play and a calm setup process.

Premium Experience

ONYX

£150

2 hours

Up to 6 players

A premium hosted gaming experience for smaller groups who want a mix of console play, racing and VR.

  • PlayStation and Nintendo gaming
  • Racing simulator
  • VR hardware
  • Displays
  • Party host/operator
  • Free digital invitation

Optional add-ons available

ONYX is designed for a focused, high-energy party with a varied mix of shared gaming moments.

Suited to
Best for smaller groups who want everyone close to the action with a premium mix of experiences.
Age/group guidance
Suitable for groups where the games and experiences can be selected around the players.
Room guidance
Works best with enough room for displays, a racing position and safe VR movement.

Included details

  • PlayStation and Nintendo gaming
  • Racing simulator
  • VR hardware
  • Displays
  • Party host/operator
  • Free digital invitation

Add-ons

Optional add-ons can extend or tailor the ONYX experience.

  • Additional timeExtend the hosted session if availability allows. Price confirmed during enquiry
  • Selected specialist experienceAsk about adding selected specialist experiences to suit the group. Ask for availability
  • Additional equipmentExtra displays or equipment may be possible depending on the venue. Price confirmed during enquiry
  • Optional add-ons can be discussed during enquiry.

Tell us about your room and group and we’ll confirm the best setup.

Ask about ONYX
Ask about ONYX

Big Party

JADE

£150

2 hours

Up to 10 players

A hosted big-party setup built around multiplayer gaming across multiple stations.

  • Multiplayer gaming across multiple stations
  • Displays
  • Party host/operator
  • Free digital invitation

Optional add-ons available

JADE is built for larger groups, helping more players join in across multiple gaming stations.

Suited to
Best for birthdays and group events where easy rotation and shared multiplayer are priorities.
Age/group guidance
Game choices can be guided by the group and the style of party you want.
Room guidance
Works best in a clear room with space for multiple stations, displays and guest movement.

Included details

  • Multiplayer gaming across multiple stations
  • Displays
  • Party host/operator
  • Free digital invitation

Add-ons

Optional add-ons can extend or tailor the JADE experience.

  • Additional timeExtend the hosted session if availability allows. Price confirmed during enquiry
  • Additional gaming stationAsk about adding another station where room and power allow. Ask for options
  • Additional equipmentExtra displays or equipment may be possible depending on the venue. Price confirmed during enquiry
  • Optional add-ons can be discussed during enquiry.

Tell us about your room and group and we’ll confirm the best setup.

Ask about JADE
Ask about JADE

Make it your own

Add extra time, selected experiences or additional equipment to either package.

Simple planning

How it works

1

Choose a package

Pick the hosted experience that best fits your group size and style of play.

2

Tell us about the venue

Share the room type, access notes and anything useful for planning the setup.

3

We deliver, set up and host

Your host brings the equipment, keeps play moving and packs everything away.

Shared moments

See the experience. Explore the setup.

Switch between the atmosphere of the party and the equipment used to create it.

Room planning

More adaptable than it looks.

Send us a room photo and we’ll help plan the layout. Party.LAN helps assess the room, access and power so you do not need technical knowledge — a photograph or rough dimensions are enough.

Check availability

Frequently asked questions

A few things you may want to know.

Clear answers before you start planning.

ONYX is a premium experience for up to 6 players and includes PlayStation and Nintendo gaming racing and VR. JADE is designed for larger groups of up to 10 players playing across multiple stations.

ONYX accommodates up to 6 players. JADE accommodates up to 10 players.

No. We deliver the equipment set everything up and host the gaming session.

The best layout depends on the venue and package. Send us a photograph or approximate room dimensions and we’ll help confirm a suitable arrangement.

Yes. Games can be selected around the group and the type of experience you want.

Optional add-ons may be available or planned depending on the package room and date. Prices are confirmed during enquiry rather than shown as fixed.

Ready to plan your party?

Online enquiries are opening soon. Package details are available above.
